caravan_court.name: Caravan Court
caravan_court.body: Cost: 4 Gold. When Purchased and at Start of Round: Place 2 Fighters on this space from the supply. Action: Take all Fighters from this space and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Fighter from the supply.
caravan_court.details: Location: South Ward. At purchase and each round start, 2 Fighters are placed here. They accumulate if unused.

dragon_tower.name: Dragon Tower
dragon_tower.body: Cost: 3 Gold. Action: Take 1 Wizard from the supply and place it in your Tavern, and draw 1 Intrigue card. Owner: Draw 1 Intrigue card.

fetlock_court.name: Fetlock Court
fetlock_court.body: Cost: 8 Gold. Action: Take 2 Fighters and 1 Wizard from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Fighter or 1 Wizard from the supply.

the_golden_horn.name: The Golden Horn
the_golden_horn.body: Cost: 4 Gold. When Purchased and at Start of Round: Take 4 Gold from the supply and place it on this space. Action: Take all Gold from this space and place it in your Tavern. Owner: Take 2 Gold from the supply.
the_golden_horn.details: Location: Trades Ward. At purchase and each round start, 4 Gold is placed here. Gold accumulates if unused.

helmstar_warehouse.name: Helmstar Warehouse
helmstar_warehouse.body: Cost: 3 Gold. Action: Take 2 Rogues and 2 Gold from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Rogue from the supply.

heroes_garden.name: Heroes' Garden
heroes_garden.body: Cost: 4 Gold. Action: Take 1 face-up Quest card from Cliffwatch Inn. You may immediately complete that Quest. If you do, score 4 bonus VP in addition to the Quest reward. (You do not score the bonus VP if you complete the Quest later.) Owner: Score 2 VP.
heroes_garden.summary: 4 Gold - Quest + 4 bonus VP if completed immediately
heroes_garden.details: Location: Sea Ward. The 4 bonus VP is only earned if the Quest is completed on the same turn it is taken from this building.

house_of_good_spirits.name: House of Good Spirits
house_of_good_spirits.body: Cost: 3 Gold. Action: Take 1 Fighter and 1 Adventurer of any type from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Fighter from the supply.

house_of_heroes.name: House of Heroes
house_of_heroes.body: Cost: 8 Gold. Action: Take 1 Cleric and 2 Fighters from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Cleric or 1 Fighter from the supply.

house_of_the_moon.name: House of the Moon
house_of_the_moon.body: Cost: 3 Gold. Action: Take 1 Cleric from the supply and place it in your Tavern, and take 1 face-up Quest card from Cliffwatch Inn. Owner: Take 2 Gold from the supply.

house_of_wonder.name: House of Wonder
house_of_wonder.body: Cost: 4 Gold. Action: Spend 2 Gold, and then take 2 Adventurers from the supply and place them in your Tavern. These Adventurers can be only Clerics or Wizards (any combination). Owner: Take 2 Gold from the supply.
house_of_wonder.details: Location: Sea Ward. Requires spending 2 Gold as part of the action.

jesters_court.name: Jesters' Court
jesters_court.body: Cost: 4 Gold. When Purchased and at Start of Round: Place 2 Rogues on this space from the supply. Action: Take all Rogues from this space and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Rogue from the supply.
jesters_court.details: Location: Castle Ward. At purchase and each round start, 2 Rogues are placed here. They accumulate if unused.

new_olamn.name: New Olamn
new_olamn.body: Cost: 8 Gold. Action: Take 2 Rogues and 1 Wizard from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Rogue or 1 Wizard from the supply.

northgate.name: Northgate
northgate.body: Cost: 3 Gold. Action: Take 1 Adventurer of any type and 2 Gold from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Score 2 VP.

the_palace_of_waterdeep.name: The Palace of Waterdeep
the_palace_of_waterdeep.body: Cost: 4 Gold. Action: Take the Ambassador piece and place it with your unused Agents. At the start of the next round, before any other player takes a turn, assign the Ambassador. Owner: Score 2 VP.
the_palace_of_waterdeep.details: Location: Castle Ward. The Ambassador is assigned before anyone else at the start of the next round. If assigned to Waterdeep Harbor, it cannot be reassigned at end of round. Once placed, the Ambassador counts as an opponent's Agent for all players.

the_skulkway.name: The Skulkway
the_skulkway.body: Cost: 4 Gold. Action: Take 1 Fighter, 1 Rogue, and 2 Gold from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Fighter or 1 Rogue from the supply.

smugglers_dock.name: Smuggler's Dock
smugglers_dock.body: Cost: 4 Gold. Action: Spend 2 Gold, and then take 4 Adventurers from the supply and place them in your Tavern. These Adventurers can be only Fighters or Rogues (any combination). Owner: Take 2 Gold from the supply.
smugglers_dock.details: Location: Castle Ward. Requires spending 2 Gold as part of the action.

spires_of_the_morning.name: Spires of the Morning
spires_of_the_morning.body: Cost: 4 Gold. When Purchased and at Start of Round: Place 1 Cleric on this space from the supply. Action: Take all Clerics from this space and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Score 2 VP.
spires_of_the_morning.details: Location: Castle Ward. At purchase and each round start, 1 Cleric is placed here. Clerics accumulate if unused.

the_stone_house.name: The Stone House
the_stone_house.body: Cost: 4 Gold. Action: Take 1 Gold from the supply for each Building tile in play. Owner: Take 2 Gold from the supply.
the_stone_house.summary: 4 Gold - 1 Gold per Building in play
the_stone_house.details: Location: South Ward. Scales with the number of advanced Building tiles currently in play.

the_three_pearls.name: The Three Pearls
the_three_pearls.body: Cost: 4 Gold. Action: Return 2 of your Adventurers of any type to the supply. Then take 3 Adventurers of any type from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 2 Gold from the supply.
the_three_pearls.details: Location: Dock Ward. Net gain of 1 Adventurer plus the ability to change types.

the_tower_of_luck.name: The Tower of Luck
the_tower_of_luck.body: Cost: 8 Gold. Action: Take 1 Cleric and 2 Rogues from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Cleric or 1 Rogue from the supply.

tower_of_the_order.name: Tower of the Order
tower_of_the_order.body: Cost: 4 Gold. When Purchased and at Start of Round: Place 1 Wizard on this space from the supply. Action: Take all Wizards from this space and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Draw 1 Intrigue card.
tower_of_the_order.details: Location: Castle Ward. At purchase and each round start, 1 Wizard is placed here. Wizards accumulate if unused.

the_waymoot.name: The Waymoot
the_waymoot.body: Cost: 4 Gold. When Purchased and at Start of Round: Place 3 VP tokens on this space. Action: Remove all VP tokens from this space and score that many VP, and take 1 face-up Quest card from Cliffwatch Inn. Owner: Score 2 VP.
the_waymoot.details: Location: South Ward. At purchase and each round start, 3 VP tokens are placed here. They accumulate if unused.

the_yawning_portal.name: The Yawning Portal
the_yawning_portal.body: Cost: 4 Gold. Action: Take 2 Adventurers of any type from the supply and place them in your Tavern. Owner: Take 1 Adventurer of any type from the supply.

the_zoarstar.name: The Zoarstar
the_zoarstar.body: Cost: 8 Gold. Action: Choose a space containing an opponent's Agent. You use that space's action as though you had assigned an Agent to it. Owner: Score 2 VP.
the_zoarstar.summary: 8 Gold - Copy an opponent's occupied action space
the_zoarstar.details: Location: Trades Ward. Lets you use an action space that is already occupied by an opponent.
